_meta.description: LLM-synthesizes structured market intelligence from internal store signals. No external research, no crawling. Writes artifact to disk (self-hosted). Returns market_intelligence inline (both modes).

shopify_import.description: Catalog context for richer market_subcategories synthesis. Degrades gracefully if absent — market_subcategories will be omitted from output.

synthesis_boundary: LLM synthesis from internal signals only — no external research, no crawling, no external APIs. All outputs are planning hypotheses.

market_intelligence.description: Primary artifact. Written to {project_root}/{project_id}/market-intelligence.json (self-hosted) or returned inline (cloud).

conditional_fields.condition: Only included if shopify catalog context is available
Only included if intake.knowledge_content_priority is set
Only included if intake.seo_goal is set
Only included if intake.aeo_goal is set

envelope.description: Runtime envelope added alongside existing output keys

new_optional_outputs.description: 2-3 strategic market hypotheses with evidence basis and confidence level
2-3 relevant market trends with direction and store relevance
Seasonal demand patterns relevant to this vertical
new_optional_outputs.derivation: llm-synthesized (omit if vertical is not seasonal)

new_optional_outputs.description: Price band anchors and where the store fits
Competition intensity, key battlegrounds, and differentiation whitespace
Adjacent markets or categories the store could expand into
Explicit unknowns the LLM could not confidently infer — preferred over hallucination

input_signals: store_profile: vertical, store_type, price_positioning, primary_market, catalog_type, brand_maturity, business_model
intake: competitor_urls (for archetype labeling only), seo_goal, aeo_goal, faq_intensity, special_notes
catalog_context: product_types, collection_titles, vendor_names (if shopify data available)
llm_prompt_strategy.output_format: Valid JSON only. No markdown fences.
constraints: Do NOT invent statistics, market share figures, search volumes, or demographic data
All outputs are planning hypotheses — not confirmed research
search_intents[*].intent_type must be one of allowed enum values
competitor_urls are used as labeling hints only — not crawled

hallucination_guards: No invented statistics or market share figures
unknown_states array must be populated when LLM cannot make confident inference
competitor_urls are naming hints only — no crawling, no research
All outputs labeled SYNTHESIS-ONLY in notes field

validation_errors.description: store_profile or normalized_intake_payload absent from pipeline
LLM response could not be parsed as valid JSON
Parsed market_intelligence fails AJV validation (self-hosted). Artifact quarantined.

cloud_behavior.inline_output: market_intelligence returned in pipeline. artifact_path is null.
cloud_behavior.full_compatible: LLM synthesis, prompt build, and signal extraction all run in cloud mode.
